text: ViTPose (Xu et al., NeurIPS 2022) introduced a plain Vision Transformer for pose estimation -- demonstrating that a simple ViT backbone without CNN-specific design (no deconvolution, no heatmap refinement) achieves SOTA on MS COCO keypoint (79.1 AP) and MPII benchmarks, scaling predictably from ViT-S to ViT-H, establishing the transformer era for human pose estimation.

The 2023-2025 evolution: MotionBERT (Zhu et al., ICCV 2023) unified 2D/3D pose estimation, mesh recovery, and motion prediction under a single pretrained transformer -- achieving 86.8 MPJPE on Human3.6M -- while RTMPose (MMPose, 2023) achieved real-time 30+ fps multi-person pose estimation on edge devices via distillation from large teacher models.
